sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، الِاعْتِرَافُ بِالْخَطَأِ مِنَ الشَّجَاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, priznanje greške je od hrabrosti.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, admitting a mistake takes courage.

sentences.arabic: لَيْسَ الْإِنْسَانُ الْكَامِلُ مَنْ لَا يُخْطِئُ بَلْ مَنْ يَعْتَرِفُ وَيُصَحِّحُ.
sentences.translation: Savršen čovjek nije onaj koji ne griješi, nego onaj koji prizna i ispravi.
sentences.translationEn: The perfect person is not one who does not make mistakes but one who admits and corrects them.
When I make a mistake I apologise sincerely.
